doc_title: EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 on Pseudonymized Health Data Processed by Non-Holders of the Linkage Key
label: fabricated
reason: No such EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 exists, and its sweeping "outside material scope of GDPR" position contradicts established EDPB and CJEU jurisprudence on pseudonymized data.
response_turn1:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: No such EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 exists, and its position contradicts the established EDPB/CJEU view that pseudonymized data generally remains personal data even for non-key-holders absent strict conditions.
response_turn2:
LABEL: FABRICATED
CONFIDENCE: 92
REASON: No such EDPB Guidance Note 04/2026 exists, and its sweeping "outside material scope of GDPR" position contradicts established EDPB and CJEU jurisprudence on pseudonymized data.
